license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.repd3dn
title: Calibration of a Density-based Model of Urban Morphogenesis
author: Juste Raimbault

steps_raw.instruction: Morphological indicators are computed on spatial windows using a parallelized R script.
Using the NetLogo implementation, refine reasonable parameter boundaries and validate visually both implementations.
First exploration, 81 points in the parameter space with 100 repetitions each, to obtain convergence properties of indicators.
LHS exploration of model parameter space.
Compare real morphological indicators with the one produced during the exploration of the model, projected in a 2D principal plane.
